deleteWorkspace.description: Are you sure you want to delete the workspace {{name}}? This action cannot be undone and all associated data will be permanently deleted.

dangerZone.description: Once a workspace is deleted, it cannot be recovered, This will permanently delete the workspace and all its related data.
